recalls.Description: Ophanie is recalling its large fluffy pink area rugs due to a serious fire hazard. These rectangular rugs, available in sizes 5 feet x 8 feet and 6 feet x 9 feet, do not meet federal flammability standards. Labels on the rugs include phrases such as "Ultra Soft Fluffy Area Rugs," "100% Polyester," and "PVC Anti-slip Dots."
recalls.Title: Ophanie Large Pink Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Ophanie at 888-281-8150 from 11:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email recall@liyi99.com, or visit http://www.ophanie.com/recall/index.html for more details.

Images.Caption: Front of Label on recalled rug
Back of Label on recalled rug

Injuries.Name: The firm has received one report of a fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Exclusively online at Amazon.com from April 2024 through June 2024 for between $42 to $65.

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations

Remedies.Name: Stop using the rugs, contact Ophanie for a full refund, and provide proof of destruction.

seo.metaDescription: Ophanie recalls large pink area rugs for fire hazard; contact for refunds and safety details.
seo.ogTitle: Ophanie Large Pink Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violations
seo.ogDescription: Ophanie recalls large pink area rugs for fire hazard; contact for refunds and safety details.

seo.twitterDescription: Ophanie recalls large pink area rugs for fire hazard; contact for refunds and safety details.

recalls.Description: Touchat is recalling its Large Fuzzy Area Rugs due to a serious fire hazard. These rectangular rugs, measuring 8 feet by 10 feet, are gray in color and labeled as "100% Polyester" with a "Made in China" tag on the underside. The rugs do not meet mandatory federal flammability standards, which could lead to increased fire risk in homes.
recalls.Title: Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Touchat at 909-390-0801 from 10 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at jurysun@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rug

Retailers.Name: Amazon.com from October 2023 through November 2023 for between $80 and $113.

Distributors.Name: Jian De Shi Jia Jin Chu Kou You Xian Gong Si DBA Touchat, of China

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to violation of federal flammability regulations

Remedies.Name: Stop using the rugs, contact Touchat for a full refund, and destroy the product by cutting it in half. Send a photo of the destroyed item to jurysun@outlook.com for refund processing.

seo.metaDescription: Touchat recalls Large Fuzzy Area Rugs for fire hazard due to flammability regulation violation. Immediate action required for refund.
seo.ogTitle: Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violation
seo.ogDescription: Touchat recalls Large Fuzzy Area Rugs for fire hazard due to flammability regulation violation. Immediate action required for refund.
seo.twitterTitle: Touchat Large Fuzzy Area Rugs Recalled for Fire Hazard Due to Flammability Regulation Violation
seo.twitterDescription: Touchat recalls Large Fuzzy Area Rugs for fire hazard due to flammability regulation violation. Immediate action required for refund.

recalls.Description: Yalande-US has issued a recall for two styles of large area rugs available in three sizes. These rugs feature neutral and multicolor designs but lack any labeling. The sizes affected include Light Gray/Ivory and Gray Beige/Light Yellow in dimensions of 5'3" x 6'6", 6'6" x 8'2", and 6'6" x 9'10". The rugs do not meet federal flammability standards, presenting a potential fire risk to consumers.
recalls.Title: Fire Hazard Recall of JURLEA Rugs Sold Exclusively on Amazon by Yalande-US
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please reach out to Yalande-US via email at yalande_us2021@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled JURLEA Rugs in Light Gray/Ivory
Recalled JURLEA Rugs in Gray Beige/Light Yellow

Retailers.Name: Exclusively online at Amazon.com from April 2023 through December 2023 for between $60 and $130.

Importers.Name: Kaka Trading Co. LTD, of China

Hazards.Name: Violation of federal flammability regulations for carpets, posing a fire hazard.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease use of the rugs immediately and contact Yalande-US for a full refund. They will need to destroy the product by cutting it in half and send a photo of the destroyed item to yalande_us2021@163.com to receive their refund. Yalande-US is also reaching out to all known customers directly.

seo.metaDescription: JURLEA rugs recalled due to fire hazard. Stop using immediately and contact Yalande-US for a refund.
